title: Fragrant Thai Fettuccine Khanom-Krok
description: Umami, creamy, comforting Thai dish with a twist of I-san flavors featuring fettuccine and crispy fried shallots. This dish combines traditional flavors with candy, creating a sweet and savory experience.

ingredients.name: Candy
ingredients.notes: Crushed Thai iced tea-flavored candy for added sweetness.

instructions: Cook fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente.
In a saucepan, mix squid ink, coconut milk, candy, fish sauce, lime juice, coriander, and sugar over medium heat until combined.
In a separate pan, heat vegetable oil and fry shallots until crispy.
In a mixing bowl, combine egg yolk, salt, and black pepper.
Add the saucepan mixture to the egg yolk mixture and mix well.
Add cooked fettuccine to the sauce and mix until combined.
Transfer the sauce-coated fettuccine to a serving dish and garnish with crispy fried shallots and a drizzle of fish sauce.
